entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The cereal crop studied for productivity and yield variability in Northwest India

entities.name: WHEAT YIELD VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in wheat production per unit area across different on-farm conditions

entities.name: NORTHWESTERN INDO-GANGETIC PLAINS
entities.description: The geographic region in India where the on-farm wheat data was collected

entities.name: INTERPRETABLE MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Analytical techniques used to explain the drivers of crop yield variability

entities.name: RIDGE REGRESSION
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: LASSO REGRESSION
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION AND REGRESSION TREES
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINES
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: GRADIENT BOOSTING
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: EXTREME GRADIENT BOOSTING
entities.description: A machine learning model used to explain wheat yield variability

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A tree-based machine learning method identified as the best performing for explaining wheat yield variability

entities.name: R2
entities.description: A statistical metric used to evaluate the goodness-of-fit of machine learning models

entities.name: ROOT MEAN SQUARE ERROR
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the precision and accuracy of machine learning models

entities.name: MEAN ABSOLUTE ERROR
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the precision and accuracy of machine learning models

entities.name: GRID SEARCH
entities.description: An approach used to fine-tune models for the bias-variance trade-off

entities.name: VARIABLE IMPORTANCE
entities.description: A post-hoc model agnostic technique used to identify important drivers of yield

entities.name: INTERACTION STRENGTH
entities.description: A post-hoc model agnostic technique used to identify interactions between variables

entities.name: TWO-WAY INTERACTION
entities.description: A post-hoc model agnostic technique used to explain variability through pairs of variables

entities.name: FRIEDMAN’S H-STATISTIC
entities.description: The statistical basis used to calculate interaction strength

entities.name: NITROGEN APPLICATION RATE
entities.description: A management variable that significantly influences wheat yield

entities.name: CROP RESIDUE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A management practice involving the retention or removal of crop residues affecting yield

entities.name: CUMULATIVE SOLAR RADIATION
entities.description: A biophysical variable measured during February and March that impacts wheat yield

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A management practice that interacts with crop residue management to affect yield

entities.name: SEEDING RATE
entities.description: A management variable that interacts with nitrogen application rate to affect yield

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The occurrence of diseases in farmers' fields affecting the response to residue management
